current_scope_findings.title: Decision log misses required columns
current_scope_findings.details: The decision table must expose the decision, source/input, rationale, output artifact and risk.

current_scope_findings.title: Decision log misses Decision Log section
current_scope_findings.details: agent-decision-log.md must contain a `## Decision Log` table with observable intermediate decisions, not hidden chain-of-thought.

current_scope_findings.title: Decision log misses Decision Log section
current_scope_findings.details: agent-decision-log.md must contain a `## Decision Log` table with observable intermediate decisions, not hidden chain-of-thought.

current_scope_findings.title: Decision log misses Decision Log section

current_scope_findings.title: Session log misses required audit sections
current_scope_findings.details: A stage session log should capture inputs read, inputs intentionally not used, key decisions, risks/fallbacks, validation and contamination check.
current_scope_findings.recommended_action: Rewrite the session log using references/agent/session-log-format.md.

current_scope_findings.title: Session log misses required audit sections

current_scope_findings.title: Test-case file does not use continuous TC numbering
current_scope_findings.details: TC numeric suffixes should be continuous in file order; numbering must not restart inside functional groups.
current_scope_findings.recommended_action: Renumber TC-* sections sequentially across the canonical file and update traceability, coverage-map, matrix, and writer-response references.

current_scope_findings.title: Test-case file has no Test-design applicability matrix
current_scope_findings.details: Canonical initial drafts should explicitly record which coverage dimensions apply, do not apply, or remain unclear.
current_scope_findings.recommended_action: Add a Test-design Applicability Matrix before review handoff.

current_scope_findings.title: Legacy traceability matrix has no atom_id column
current_scope_findings.details: This matrix predates the atom_id / traceability_ref contract. Do not mechanically migrate it without a reviewer pass.
evidence: columns=trace_ref, package_id, source_ref, req_id, linked_tc_or_gap, coverage_status
current_scope_findings.recommended_action: Treat this as a legacy baseline. New or updated matrices should add stable ATOM-* ids.
